Copied from [http://sliekas.org/basara/gusdocs/doku.php/main:modding_docs:lua:networkplayerevent here].

====== Class NetworkPlayerEvent ======
<pre>
===== See also: =====
</pre>

[[Lua global#bindings.playernetworkinit|bindings.playerNetworkInit]], [[Lua global#network_player_event|network_player_event]], [[Lua global#network_player_event|network_player_event]]

===== send =====
<pre>
 send(player, [data[, connection[, mode[, rules]]]])
</pre>

Sends a player event to one or more computers.

//player// is the [[Lua player|Player]] object to [[#send]] the event on.

See [[Lua networkgameevent#send|Lua:networkgameevent#send]] for documentation of the other parameters.

<!-- imported from Wayback Machine: https://web.archive.org/web/20100618081359/http://www.openlierox.net:80/wiki/index.php/Lua:networkplayerevent -->
